001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.controller;
002
003import android.graphics.drawable.Drawable;
004import android.os.Bundle;
005import android.util.Log;
006import android.view.LayoutInflater;
007import android.view.View;
008import android.view.ViewGroup;
009import android.widget.Toast;
010import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
011import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
012import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
013import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
014import androidx.lifecycle.Transformations;
015import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
016import android.widget.RadioButton;
017import android.widget.RadioGroup;
018import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.databinding.FragmentDigSiteBinding;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.databinding.LayoutToolItemBinding;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo.DigSiteGridWithSquares;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel.GameplayViewModel;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel.ToolType;
024
025@AndroidEntryPoint
026public class DigSiteFragment extends Fragment {
027
028  private FragmentDigSiteBinding binding;
029  private GameplayViewModel gameplayViewModel;
030  private LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares> digSiteGridWithSquares;
031
032  @Nullable
033  @Override
034  public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container,
035      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
036    binding = FragmentDigSiteBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
037    for (ToolType tool : ToolType.values()) {
038      Drawable icon = getResources().getDrawable(tool.getImageId(), null);
039      RadioButton toolButton = (RadioButton) LayoutToolItemBinding.inflate(inflater,
040          binding.digToolBar, false).getRoot();
041      toolButton.setText(tool.getToolName());
042      toolButton.setCompoundDrawablesRelativeWithIntrinsicBounds(null, icon, null, null);
043      toolButton.setTag(tool);
044      binding.digToolBar.addView(toolButton);
045      binding.digToolBar.check(toolButton.getId());
046    }
047    binding.digToolBar.setOnCheckedChangeListener(
048        (group, checkedId) -> {
049          if (checkedId == -1) {
050            return;
051          }
052          View checkedView = binding.digToolBar.findViewById(checkedId);
053          ToolType tool = (ToolType) checkedView.getTag();
054          gameplayViewModel.setCurrentTool(tool);
055          Log.d("DigSiteFragment", "Selected tool: " + tool.getToolName());
056        }
057    );
058    return binding.getRoot();
059  }
060
061  @Override
062  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
063    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
064    gameplayViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(GameplayViewModel.class);
065    digSiteGridWithSquares = gameplayViewModel.getGameLivedata();
066    binding.digSite.setOnCellClickListener(
067        coord -> {
068          gameplayViewModel.handleTapWithCurrentTool(coord);
069          Log.d("DigSiteFragment", "Tapped on cell: " + coord);
070        });
071    Transformations.distinctUntilChanged(
072        Transformations.map(
073            digSiteGridWithSquares, DigSiteGridWithSquares::getGridSquares))
074        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (gridSquares) ->
075            binding.digSite.setGridSquares(gridSquares)
076        );
077    gameplayViewModel.getRemainingBrushes()
078        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (remainingBrushes) -> {
079          if (remainingBrushes != null) {
080            binding.brushesCount.setText(String.valueOf(remainingBrushes));
081            if (remainingBrushes <= 0) {
082              gameOver();
083            }
084          }
085        });
086    gameplayViewModel.getScannerCount()
087        .observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), (scannerCount) -> {
088          if (scannerCount != null) {
089            binding.scannersCount.setText(String.valueOf(scannerCount));
090          }
091        });
092  }
093
094  @Override
095  public void onDestroyView() {
096    binding = null;
097    super.onDestroyView();
098  }
099
100  private void gameOver() {
101    Toast.makeText(requireContext(), "Game Over!", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show();
102    binding.digSite.setEnabled(false);
103  }
104}
